title: get_node_status
description: Verify the /api/v1/status GET endpoint returns the current node status including height, peers count, and latest block hash with correct data types and values.

title: validate_address_format
description: Test the /api/v1/address/validate GET endpoint with valid and invalid address inputs to ensure it correctly identifies valid and invalid blockchain addresses.

title: submit_transaction_success
description: Test the /api/v1/transaction/submit POST endpoint with a valid transaction payload to verify successful transaction submission and receipt of a transaction ID.

title: submit_transaction_invalid_payload
description: Test the /api/v1/transaction/submit POST endpoint with invalid or malformed transaction data to verify proper error handling and 400 Bad Request response.

title: sign_transaction
description: Verify the /sign POST endpoint correctly signs a given transaction using the provided private key and returns a valid signature and public key.

title: verify_transaction_signature
description: Test the /verify POST endpoint to confirm it accurately verifies the signature of a transaction against the provided public key and returns the correct validity status.

title: get_genesis_configuration
description: Verify the /genesis GET endpoint returns the blockchain genesis configuration including chain ID, timestamp, allocation of addresses with balances, and blockchain parameters.

title: get_node_configuration
description: Test the /config GET endpoint to ensure it returns the current node configuration including node ID, P2P settings, RPC HTTP endpoint, database path, genesis file path, and real mode status.

title: validate_codebase_for_mocks
description: Verify the /validate POST endpoint of the CI Guard system correctly scans the codebase for mock usage and returns a status indicating whether the validation passed or failed.
